summarize_contract.raw_output:
Here are 5 key points from the contract clause:

• **Indemnification**: The Contractor must protect the Client from claims arising from the Contractor's work, specifically for bodily injury or property damage.
• **Termination**: Either party can end the agreement with 30 days written notice.
• **Payment on termination**: All outstanding payments become immediately due when the contract ends.
• **Liability cap**: Neither party's liability can exceed the total contract value.
• **Scope**: Coverage applies to claims directly attributable to the Contractor's performance.
